# 3dsvg

Embeddable React component that turns SVGs and text into interactive 3D objects with PBR materials, textures, animations, and shadows.

npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/3dsvg
Visual editor: https://3dsvg.design
GitHub: https://github.com/renatoworks/3dsvg

## Install

npm install 3dsvg

Peer dependencies: react, react-dom, three, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei.

## Import

import { SVG3D } from "3dsvg";

For Next.js (SSR), use dynamic import:

const SVG3D = dynamic(
  () => import("3dsvg").then((m) => ({ default: m.SVG3D })),
  { ssr: false }
);

## Component: SVG3D

Renders a single 3D object. Provide either `text` or `svg` as content.

### Content props (provide one)

- text: string — Text to render in 3D.
- font: string — Google Font name. Default: "DM Sans". Available: "DM Sans", "Bebas Neue", "Playfair Display", "Righteous", "Black Ops One", "Permanent Marker", "Rubik Mono One", "Pacifico", "Oswald", "Archivo Black".
- svg: string — SVG markup or a URL. Accepts raw `<svg>...</svg>` markup, absolute URLs (`https://...`), or path URLs (`/logo.svg`, `./icon.svg`). URLs are fetched automatically. Paths must have a non-none fill.

### Shape props

- depth: number (default 1) — Extrusion depth. Higher = thicker.
- smoothness: number (default 0.2) — Bevel and curve quality, 0–1.
- color: string (default "#ffffff") — Base color hex.

### Material props

- material: "default" | "plastic" | "metal" | "glass" | "rubber" | "chrome" | "gold" | "clay" | "emissive" | "holographic" — Preset. Default: "default".
- metalness: number — Override preset metalness (0–1).
- roughness: number — Override preset roughness (0–1).
- opacity: number — Override preset opacity (0–1). Below 1 enables glass-like transmission.
- wireframe: boolean (default false) — Wireframe mode.

### Texture props

- texture: string — Image URL to map onto the 3D surface.
- textureRepeat: number (default 1) — How many times the texture tiles.
- textureRotation: number (default 0) — Texture rotation in radians.
- textureOffset: [number, number] (default [0, 0]) — UV offset [x, y].

When a texture is set, the base color is overridden to white so the texture renders at full fidelity.

### Lighting props

- lightPosition: [number, number, number] (default [5, 8, 5]) — Key light position [x, y, z].
- lightIntensity: number (default 1.2) — Key light brightness.
- ambientIntensity: number (default 0.3) — Ambient fill light.
- shadow: boolean (default true) — Show contact shadows.

### Camera props

- rotationX: number (default 0) — Initial X rotation in radians.
- rotationY: number (default 0) — Initial Y rotation in radians.
- zoom: number (default 8) — Camera Z distance. Auto-adjusts on narrow/portrait viewports to keep the object visible.
- fov: number (default 50) — Field of view in degrees.

### Interaction props

- interactive: boolean (default true) — Master toggle. false disables drag, zoom, and cursor orbit.
- cursorOrbit: boolean (default true) — Object subtly follows cursor.
- orbitStrength: number (default 0.15) — Cursor-follow strength in radians.
- draggable: boolean (default true) — Allow drag to rotate.
- scrollZoom: boolean (default false) — Allow scroll to zoom. Off by default so embeds don't hijack page scroll.
- resetOnIdle: boolean (default false) — Return to default position after inactivity.
- resetDelay: number (default 2) — Seconds before reset.

### Animation props

- animate: "none" | "spin" | "float" | "pulse" | "wobble" | "spinFloat" | "swing" — Loop animation. Default: "none".
- animateSpeed: number (default 1) — Speed multiplier.
- animateReverse: boolean (default false) — Reverse direction.

### Intro animation props

- intro: "zoom" | "fade" | "none" — Entrance animation. Default: "zoom".
- introDuration: number (default 2.5) — Duration in seconds.
- introFrom: { zoom?: number; opacity?: number } — Start state.
- introTo: { zoom?: number; opacity?: number } — End state.

### Layout props

- width: string | number (default "100%") — Container width.
- height: string | number (default "100%") — Container height.
- background: string (default "transparent") — Canvas background color.
- className: string — CSS class on the wrapper div.

### Event props

- onReady: () => void — Fires when WebGL is ready and first frame is rendered.
- onAnimationComplete: () => void — Fires when intro finishes.
- onLoadingChange: (loading: boolean, progress: number) => void — Fires during geometry processing with loading state and progress (0-100). Geometry is processed asynchronously in batches to keep the browser responsive. Use this to show custom loading UI for complex SVGs.

### Advanced props

- resetKey: number — Increment to force position reset.
- registerCanvas: (canvas: HTMLCanvasElement) => void — Callback with the WebGL canvas element.
- children: React.ReactNode — Extra 3D elements rendered inside the scene.

## Examples

Minimal text:
<SVG3D text="Hello" />

Chrome spinning text:
<SVG3D text="3D" font="Bebas Neue" animate="spin" depth={2} />

SVG from file:
<SVG3D svg="/logo.svg" material="gold" animate="float" />

Remote SVG with texture:
<SVG3D
  svg="https://cdn.example.com/icon.svg"
  material="gold"
  texture="https://example.com/marble.jpg"
  textureRepeat={2}
/>

Custom lighting:
<SVG3D text="Lit" material="metal" lightPosition={[0, 10, 3]} lightIntensity={2} ambientIntensity={0.1} />

No shadows, static:
<SVG3D text="Clean" material="clay" shadow={false} interactive={false} intro="none" />

## Important notes

- SVG paths MUST have a non-transparent fill color. Paths with fill="none" will not be detected.
- Creates a WebGL context. Browsers limit these to ~8-16 per page — keep to 3-4 instances max.
- Requires a browser environment (WebGL). Use dynamic imports in Next.js for SSR safety.
